title: QueryAPI
description: GET /v1/summary and GET /v1/observations/query response shapes (server-side query layer for the web viewer)

SummaryResponse.description: Ledger aggregation over [begin, end]. The range filter applies to top-level records only (interval overlap: record.end >= begin && record.begin <= end); an in-range root contributes its entire recursive subtree regardless of child dates; orphans (parentId present, parent absent) are excluded; species with non-positive totals are dropped. species is sorted by count desc, then taxonId asc.

lastObservedAt.description: Max record `end` among this taxon's contributing records

ObservationsQueryResponse.description: Paged top-level records overlapping [begin, end], newest `begin` first. netCount is the record's recursive subtree total (adjustments applied).

cursor.description: Opaque continuation token; empty when hasMore is false
